name: Krautfleisch- Pork Casserole w/ Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Pork, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the pork cubes in seasoned flour and caraway seeds.
2. Heat lard in a pan with a lid. Saute the meat, shaking from time to time, until brown for 10 minutes.
3. Add paprika and sliced onions. Cook for a few more minutes.
4. Add tomato puree, shredded cabbage (sauerkraut), vinegar, and water. Season with salt.
5. Simmer gently for 1 1/2 hours until the meat is tender.
6. Stir in sour cream or plain yogurt just before serving.
